description: Project management: create, list, use, remove, resolve project configurations (project.py:2)

key_interfaces.name: project_dir
key_interfaces.description: Return project directory path as string (legacy compat wrapper)

key_interfaces.name: create_project_config
key_interfaces.description: Create project directory and write config.toml with server, runner, channels, session

key_interfaces.name: list_projects
key_interfaces.description: Return sorted list of project names from projects directory

key_interfaces.name: get_default_project
key_interfaces.description: Return default project name from ~/.zchat/default file

key_interfaces.name: resolve_project
key_interfaces.description: Resolve project: explicit arg > .zchat marker file walk > default

key_interfaces.name: load_project_config
key_interfaces.description: Load and validate config.toml (rejects old [irc]/[tmux] format), fills defaults

key_interfaces.name: set_config_value
key_interfaces.description: Set a dotted key in project config.toml with type coercion (bool, int, string)

user_flows.name: create project
steps: resolve default channels/runner/mcp_server_cmd from defaults module
build config dict with server, runner, channels, etc

user_flows.name: resolve project
steps: if explicit name provided, return it
walk up from CWD looking for .zchat marker file
